kitchen.name: Kitchen
kitchen.description: The smell of rotten food fills the air. Pots and pans hang from the ceiling, swaying gently despite the lack of wind.

child_bedroom.name: Child's Bedroom
child_bedroom.description: Toys are scattered across the floor. A small bed sits in the corner, its sheets twisted into a knot.

library.name: Library
library.description: Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves line the walls. Several books float open in mid-air, their pages turning on their own.

entrance_hall.name: Entrance Hall
entrance_hall.description: A grand staircase dominates the room. Portraits on the walls seem to watch your every move.
